_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Similarly, these cells expressed STAT3 protein with some basal level of STAT3 activation in wt, ipNF05.5, ST88-14, NF90-8 and RHT-92 cells
details: Expressed STAT3 protein with basal level of STAT3 activation as assessed with phosphorylation-specific antibody to Tyr 705 residue
